#  Submittal Approvers 
#### Summary
As part of the Procore Analytics Project Management Report, the Submittal Approvers report page shows information about each step in each submittal's workflow.
#### Sample Report Page
![Procore Analytics Submittal Approvers](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/8dc43039c79d39f0be67d466e61660ba/5f6f398420ca37e7d52969505e117ca4/procore-analytics-submittal-approvers.png?fm=webp)
_This sample report page was created using mock data for demonstration purposes only._
